assumptions_required: hardware_tier=64 (inferred from hardware_instance=M5 and ctx=65536); oracle_type=public_verifier; thermal_status=unknown; model_config_id must be backfilled as e.g. qwen36-35b-a3b-q4km-ctx65k-{v1prod|v3det}-pp01; start_time must be derived from run_started_ms epoch
allowed_use: Exploratory dashboards with visible caveat. Acceptable for the Sprint 1 overnight tier-64 anchor reuse provided every aggregate visibly tags the assumptions above. Not valid for model-admission decisions.
notes: Has all denormalized fields except model_config_id and hardware_tier; the iter-distribution W1 schema (v1) is the closest predecessor to the v2 registry.

allowed_use: Same as iter-distribution-runs.csv. Useful as a diff anchor against any post-pilot edits to the live CSV.

assumptions_required: Predates the 2026-04-29 pilot loops; harness/sampler/timeout settings not guaranteed to match the live CSV.

notes: Useful qualitatively to show the sweep evolved between 2026-04-28 and 2026-04-29.
